programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienzan las vacaciones y en el primer día en la casa shore se reúnen los viejos y nuevos integrantes para comenzar unas vacaciones de locura. El regreso a la casa original parece tener efecto en sus habitantes y los nuevos romances.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego de una primera noche salvaje, los Shore deciden pasar una tarde tranquila en la playa en donde aprovechan para hablar de lo sucedido la noche anterior y conocerse mejor. Llega la noche, los tragos, la fiesta y comienza la competencia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega el nuevo "Boss" a la casa y los Shore descubren que sus obligaciones no son nada parecidas a lo que esperaban. Después de un día de trabajo nada mejor que unos drinks y lo que parecía una fiesta tranquila, termina en una noche de locura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa Shore y la llegada del Boss emociona a casi todos los integrantes de las casa quienes salen a disfrutar de un nuevo y divertido día laboral. Al caer la noche los Shore deciden ir a un sitio más tranquilo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una invitada colombiana llega a la casa shore mientras Fernando tiene que irse de Acapulco para ver a su medico y decidir si puede terminar sus vacaciones en familia. Todo esta listo para la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes de la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Erick llega a la casa Shore e inmediatamente empieza el coqueteo con una de las nuevas integrantes. La fiesta comienza y las comadres deciden pasar el día esposadas. Por fin llega la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Cintia cada vez aguanta menos la actitud de las comadres y decide terminar sus vacaciones. Una vez mas llega el boss y les anuncia que su próximo trabajo va a ser en Chihuahua.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore continúan disfrutando su viaje a Chihuahua. Erick siente cada vez mas presión para que se lleve una fea a la cama cosa que a Leslie le molesta.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego de una noche de locura, Leslie se molesta al enterarse de los coqueteos entre Mane y Erick.

programme.desc: Se acaban las vacaciones y los shores molestos por las constantes borracheras de Maria deciden hacerle una intervención. Llega el día del Tadeo Fest y parece ser el momento perfecto para que Erick cumpla con el "orco Challenge".

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión la Ciudad de México será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Después de una noche de golpes, los shore comienzan un nuevo día en el que los hombres de la casa medirán su capacidad de comer mientras las mujeres se animan al calor de unos tragos.

programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.desc: The Shores wonder about Dania's whereabouts. Chile and Diana go on a romantic date. Karime and Mane end up in the hospital. Pepe and Ramiro receive a call that changes their plans, while the Shores prepare for the carnival.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go Hunting!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Rohan Kishibe's Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu become friends with a Stand user named Shigekiyo Yangu, a.k.a. Shigechi, who can use his Stand to find and collect the money that is scattered across town. Impressed by the boy’s abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 2

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross set Road Trip records the last time he was paired with James Braxton, but can he do it again? They set off from Boston and head to their first auction in the Norfolk town of Fakenham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In a Ford Zephyr, auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton continue their hunt from the Lincolnshire town of Stamford, then travel east around Norfolk before ending up at an auction in the Cambridgeshire market town of St Ives.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton are half-way through their trip in their Ford Zephyr. This leg sets off from Shenton in Leicestershire and takes them to auction in the village of Bourne End, Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton is in the lead as they kick off in their Ford Zephyr from Rushden, Northamptonshire, which means Charlie Ross is playing catch up as they search for perfect purchases in Cambridgeshire, Bedfordshire and Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton kick things off in Brasted, then journey through the Kent and Surrey countryside. Charlie takes a risky punt on a pricey purchase, but has he done enough to take the road trip crown from rival James?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Raj Bisram take a 1973 Triumph Spitfire around East Anglia. Anita uncovers the little-known story about anti-slavery campaigner Thomas Clarkson, and Raj hears about an agricultural pioneer at the stunning Holkham Hall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Behind the wheel of a Triumph Spitfire, Anita Manning and Raj Bisram shop in Norfolk. Anita learns about a forgotten global dancing phenomenon, while Raj heads to Blicking Hall to find out about its controversial former owner.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Raj Bisram travel through Suffolk, Kent, and Surrey. Anita visits a former silk mill with an incredible royal connection. Raj hears about the birth of interior design and the pioneering artist behind it -- William Morris.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The gorgeous Kent towns of Deal, Sandwich, and Faversham host Anita Manning and Raj Bisram for some antique shopping. Raj has soared ahead with huge profits, but Anita finds an Eastern deity figure she hopes will attract big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning's big win at the last auction is proving a sticky wicket for Raj Bisram, who's keen to avoid the wooden spoon. Raj learns about WWII's Operation Dynamo. Anita uncovers the story behind the bloody murder of Thomas Becket.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon set off from the midlands in a 1970 Citroen DS20. Phil spends a lot of cash on a 19th-century butter churn, while Catherine finds two attractive 1940s compacts.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling around in a classic Citroen, Catherine Southon finds a nice croquet set and a rare 1930's novelty biscuit tin, while Phil Serrell learns how flying boats gave us the word 'airport.'

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon decides to change her buying strategy, going for more of Philip Serrell's rust-and-woodworm fare. Phil diverts to the beach and asks a local fisherman if he has some antique chandlery to sell!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to Porthcurno to see the incredible cables that stretch from this little village to South America, Australia, and India. Phil Serrell goes for a ride on a replica of the Puffing Devil.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Whitehaven, Cumbria, chairs rescued from a bonfire and salvaged tiles make their owner's day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Stafford, where it's a good day for ceramics furniture, painting, clocks and the finest scientific instrument yet seen on the show is discovered.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the last of the present series the experts enthuse over Pre-Columbian pots from Peru, Chinese art, English silver and American glass. Presented by Hugh Scully from the old Naval barracks church of St George at Gillingham in Kent.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully takes the experts to the gardens of Athelhampton House in Dorset, near to where the author Thomas Hardy was born. Finds include a valuable painting found in an attic, and a rare Scottish silver drinking cup.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts travel to Lowestoft, Suffolk, on Britain's east coast. Items include a Sèvres potty, which came from Woburn Abbey; and a traveler's calendar watch with seven subsidiary dials for different time zones.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the Victorian town of Oldham in Lancashire, finds include potentially valuable bookmarks, Roman toga pins unearthed by a metal detector, and three examples of work by LS Lowry – one of them on the back of a cigarette packet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Clydebank, Glasgow, the surprises of the day include a pen-and-ink drawing of fairies by a celebrated Scottish artist; and a fine marine painting which caused a family fracas.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully takes his team of experts to Castle Howard, a 300-year-old stately home in North Yorkshire. Finds include an alabaster carving of Mary and Jesus, possibly dating from the 15th century; and an oil painting by a Royal Academician.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The show returns to Castle Howard in North Yorkshire to find out more about the stately home, while Hugh Scully presents three unseen items from previous shows.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts travel to Devonshire, to visit the south coast resort of Torquay, where Agatha Christie set many of her thrillers. Here they find a collection of photographs and memorabilia relating to the murderer Dr Crippen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts visit Worcester Cathedral, where their discoveries include a stoneware pot for church wine that dates from the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Winchester College, Britain's oldest school, Hugh Scully admires a collection of Georgian and Victorian jewelry found hidden in the drawer of a boxed gentlemen's travelling set and a rare album of Indian watercolours from the 1820s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and the team head out to Morpeth in Northumberland, where family treasures brought along for evaluation include a richly engraved glass vase, a pre-war tin-plated Mickey Mouse, two fine paintings of Venice, and a charming old love token.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques featured in this programme from Llanelli in Wales include two Minton Majolica urns left by an impoverished naval captain, a brass monocular microscope, and an old collection of comics.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Bellator 208: Fedor vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Long Island as MMA legend Fedor Emelianenko takes on the American Gangster Chael Sonnen with the winner advancing to the finals of the Heavyweight World Grand Prix. Also, Benson Henderson and Cheick Kongo return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Israel with a featherweight world title fight as Patricio Pitbull puts the belt on the line against Emmanuel Sanchez. Also Light Heavyweights Phil Davis takes on Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shelby wants to find the truth about her dad's online relationship with a woman he's never met. Dad David says "Maria" has a $10 million inheritance and says he knows for a fact that "Maria" is a real person and he can't wait to introduce her one day.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil deals with several important issues about the body: conquering erectile dysfunction, taming a fitness obsession, and beating blushing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kathi says son, Nico, 14, plays video games all day & charged thousands buying tokens. Nico attended only six days of school this year & when disciplined, Nico rages, curses & terrorizes. Kathi says he learned this behavior from his dad, Evo; Evo agrees.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Former Subway spokesman Jared Fogle caught on tape. Listen to the shocking, never-before-heard audio recordings. Former journalist Rochelle Herman-Walrond secretly taped the pitchman for years as part of the FBI's investigation. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melissa, 26, left home without warning & flew 2,000 miles across the country, leaving behind a note that said, "One day, Dr. Phil will be able to help me." The family says she hadn't "been herself." Melissa says she's ready to tell why she vanished.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Horrific allegations are tearing a family apart. Todd, ex girlfriend Latia & mom Diana tell their versions of sexual misconduct. Todd says he will do anything to prove his innocence. Dr. Phil calls in a polygraph examiner, with shocking results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alisha says her son, Kevin, 10, pushed the family to the limit with violent outbursts. At home, knives and lighters are hidden & siblings lock themselves in their rooms at night. Alisha's says the 'future Kevin' may hurt the entire family or end a life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodi Arias killed her ex-boyfriend Travis Alexander in 2008. He was stabbed more than 24 times, had his throat slit & was shot in the head. Behind-the-scenes trial details from prosecutor Juan Martinez & a juror & Travis's sister Tanisha speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil turns up the heat on the fireman who slept with his teenage nanny, and delves deeper into the affair that shattered the lives of a husband and wife, and her best friend and parents. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valentine's Day! Dr. Phil tackles romance dilemmas. Can't cook, don't know how to dress sexily, never buy the right gift, or have problems getting your groove on in the love department? Dr. Phil has solutions!Plus learn what men really want!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dustin, Chance & Nova say mom Sonya, is a liar & manipulator, neglecting them--deplorable conditions, no food, no hot water. They say mom bought fast food for herself & her boyfriend as they starved. Then she disappeared. Sonya says she doesn't remember.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says stepfather Ralph routinely sexually abused her as a teen. Angie says that her stepfather didn't stop with her, he turned his attention, affection & sexual abuse toward her daughter Hannah. They say grandma Leta knew, yet looked the other way.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Gwen Stefani opens up to Drew about motherhood, her new music, working alongside husband Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Sophia Roe is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up something delicious. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in Drew's News and sharing their best weekend suggestions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dr. Charles Sophyis joining Drew. Plus, an all-new Drew-gooderfeaturing a hero mailman. Drew and Ross Mathewsare serving the news sunny-side upin an all-newDrew's News!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: ESPN Monday Night Football" commentator Joe Buck joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to break down the latest headlines of the day.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew's chat with Michelle Obama continues and she's talking all about making friends in the White House and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Schmigadoon!" star Kristin Chenoweth is telling Drew about meeting Ariana Grande for the first time, her date with Prince, and the time Nicole Kidman helped her out at a party.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Culinary legend Ina Garten joins Drew at the news desk to break down the latest food headlines including desserts only invites and the gravestone recipe trend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Idris Elba and his wife Sabrina Elba join Drew for a lively conversation while cruising around New York City in her minivan, which Drew likes to call her "Drewber.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Office" star Rainn Wilson is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the surprising reason Kate Winslet has a hard time re-watching herself in "Titanic".

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Weird: The Al Yankovic Story" star Daniel Radcliffe stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines covering a new middle seat airplane lottery and whether hearing birds can help boost your mood.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the bride who went viral for asking her guests to wear wedding dresses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pretty Baby" star Brooke Shields is telling Drew all about her new documentary and is joined by executive producer of the film Ali Wentworth.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: HGTV's Lauren Makk is joining Drew! Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering the week's hottest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E001) The gang kicks off college with a huge party. Brenda is uncertain about her decision. Andrea learns hurtful information about Gil.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E002) Brandon's new girlfriend has intimacy issues and Brenda has trouble at school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E003) Brenda arrives back in Beverly Hills in the middle of the night and Steve's scheming ways almost backfire as the gang decides which classes to take.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E004) It is rush week on campus. Now on the staff of the campus radio station, David and Donna man the graveyard shift.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E005) Dylan finds Kelly with another guy. Donna is offered a daytime slot at the radio station, which causes problems with David. Andrea plans a date with her English teacher.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E006) Kelly recommends that she and Dylan see other people. Mr. Walsh sets Brenda up on a blind date with his client's son.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E007) Andrea takes initiative in her relationship with Dan. David and Kelly take sides in a fight between their parents.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E008) Brenda's relationship with Stuart causes a stir at the Walsh's twentieth-anniversary party. Brandon catches Dylan off guard with unexpected results.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E009) Brenda and Stuart argue about the details of their marriage. Lucinda has unsettling news for Brandon.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E010) The gang follows Brenda and Stuart to Las Vegas in hopes of stopping the wedding.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E011) Laura threatens to label Steve as a date rapist at a campus rally. He loses Celeste when he confesses his indiscretion.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E012) Brandon takes an unexpected road trip and Dylan accepts a Thanksgiving dinner invitation at the Walsh's after declining an invitation from Kelly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E013) Brandon encourages Emily to pursue her dreams and Steve is caught stealing.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E014) Donna and David celebrate their first year together. Dylan and Kelly get back together, while Andrea falls in love with a new boyfriend.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: It's an extra day of cray-cray as former Big Brother winner Derrick makes a surprise appearance.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be the new HoH, which new temptation will be released, and how will it affect who goes on the block?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto and will it be used to save either Jason or Matt? Plus, Zingbot, the sultan of insult and the king of zing is in the house!

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A floater and an outsider are on the block, and a live eviction will decide who leaves and who gets to fight another day.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: With nine evicted and eight remaining, the houseguests hang on for dear life to become the next HOH.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: One pair is running the show as the houseguests compete in a high-stakes battle to stay in the game. Who will win the power of veto and will it be used to save either Matt or Raven?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The last of the showmances is being ripped apart, but the unlucky lovers won't go out without a fight as the fallout from the Veto meeting sends the house into turmoil.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: With three weeks left and another double eviction coming up, the houseguests find themselves racing to the finish in the final stretch of the game.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The houseguests compete for the power of Veto in a special competition hosted by Bobby Moynihan.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The houseguests are in double-trouble when another live double eviction shows who is pulling the strings and who is merely a puppet.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Witness the moments you missed during the live double evictions, and a new HoH will rise to power. Plus, don't miss the world premiere of BB Comic's movie trailer, 'The Revengers.'

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the power of Veto? And will it be used so save either Alex or Kevin from eviction? Plus, it's a surprise eviction, who will be next to head to jury?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Find out who Paul will nominate for eviction, who will win the final Veto competition of the summer and which houseguests will make it to the Final 3.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The battle for the final HoH begins. Plus, Josh, Paul and Christmas celebrate the best moments of the summer including tons of moments you haven't seen.

programme.title: The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable hero, Leroy, who aspires to become a kung fu master. Though black and living in Harlem with his family, Leroy lives like a Chinese. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: School Daze
programme.desc: Innovative filmmaker, Spike Lee (She's Gotta Have It), brings to the screen a music-filled, offbeat contemporary comedy that takes an unforgettable look at black college life. Rating: R

programme.title: Higher Learning
programme.desc: Kristy Swanson, Omar Epps and Michael Rapaport star as first-term freshmen who get a crash course in diversity, identity and sexuality in writer/director John Singleton's bold look at contemporary college life.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Bus driver Ralph Kramden and sanitation engineer Ed Norton are best friends who dream of making it big. Their most recent “get-rich-quick” plan finds the boys out to make their fortune by hiring a dog trainer to race their pet greyhound.

programme.title: Norbit

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final four rednecks look forward to making a run for the hundred grand and are shocked to find one of them being eliminated in a good old-fashioned shoot out right before getting that chance.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. A vehicle is pulled over and a passenger is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit-and-run death of a little girl.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en una tienda de comestibles acaba en un tiroteo que deja cinco muertos. El policía cree que Grissom le guarda rencor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo debe investigar un crimen en el que un marido y su esposa, estrella del porno, fueron asesinados al estilo ejecución.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y Sara se enfrentan a la muerte de lo que al principio parece ser un travesti.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo femenino mutilado es descubierto atado a los bajos de un autobús que transporta presas de un correccional de mujeres, después de que un brazo amputado salga volando de debajo del vehículo y golpee un coche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un violento asesinato en el aparcamiento de un casino y otro episodio en la sala de interrogatorios de la policía llevan a los CSI a un sorprendente descubrimiento tras otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine y Nick intentan determinar la causa del incendio de una casa en el que muere una adolescente. El incendio se produce en el mismo barrio que otro incendio provocado similar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de un corredor durante una competición. Mientras tanto, Sara y Warrick investigan la muerte de una pareja en una habitación de hotel, que inicialmente se pensó que había sido un asesinato-suicidio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una montaña rusa se sale de la vía y deja seis muertos. El equipo de CSI investiga si se trata de un accidente o de juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes aparecen asesinados tras estafar a los casinos de Sam Braun.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una empleada de un casino es golpeada y violada cuando vuelve a casa del trabajo, pero sobrevive e identifica a su agresor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche febril en Las Vegas se salda con un hombre muerto con un traje de alienígena, otro hombre muerto en una bañera, una mujer muerta con dos hombres sospechosos en la escena del crimen y otro hombre muerto con una polaroid de otro hombre muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las fuertes lluvias en Las Vegas arrastran un cadáver por las alcantarillas. Mientras el equipo investiga, encuentran huesos en el alcantarillado que solo podrían ser de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The world of extreme skateboard videos turns deadly when the competition heats up inside the studio. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tax season gets off to a bang when two IRS agents turn up dead. Horatio Caine and the CSI Team are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: South Beach Miami’s sexiest nightclub becomes a hotbed of revenge when murder closes the doors on a unique dating service.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl becomes the innocent pawn in an ugly and abusive game that ends in murder. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high school reunion turns deadly when a classmate acts on a 15-year-old grudge, Horatio and Yelina discover that Ray may still be alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team works against a ticking clock to find the purported accomplice in a years-old ax-murder case before the convicted killer is executed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team races against time to locate and deactivate a radioactive bomb set to go off in the middle of downtown Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a couple is found beaten in their home, the CSIs think they have the suspect after a mother ID's her son, but all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a powerful gang leader is murdered, the CSI New York team of investigators must find the killer before a street war breaks out.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A jewel heist at the penthouse of one of New York's most powerful attorneys takes a bizarre turn as the case leads the CSIs to a man in the morgue.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators finds a body on a rooftop and must find the killer who is manipulating crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With a sniper lose in New York City, Mac must relive an abduction case that might have created one of the city's deadliest foes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators experience eerie occurrences after a woman is found who has literally been scared to death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes up against the deputy chief of detectives when a dark secret from the chief's past threatens his reputation and family.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Spanish club promoter is found dead, Detective Mac Taylor must battle with the head of Barcelona's crime lab to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El asesinato en la violación del domicilio de un estudiante universitario envía a los detectives tras la pista de china blanca, heroína sin cortar que ha caído en las manos equivocadas.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un sospechoso armado es descubierto en una escena de crimen protegida. La investigación de rutina se convierte en una persecución a pie a través de los túneles del metro de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los detectives descubren que la investigación de una víctima de homicidio vehicular entra en colisión con un aficionado de los Medias Rojas, encontrado muerto en un estacionamiento.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un desayuno informal se convierte en un tiroteo, el detective Mac Taylor debe volver a armar las piezas del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Es verano en la ciudad mientras Mac y Hawkes investigan la muerte sospechosa de un escalador que intentaba escalar el edificio Empire State.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Jesus, Maria y Jose
programme.desc: Por la presecución del Rey Herodés de Judea, el niño Jesús y sus padres Maria y José huyen por el desierto de Egipto, donde el niño aprende sus primeras letras, culminando con al iniciacíon de su vida secreta.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: Jesús, nuestro Señor
programme.desc: Ultima parte de la trilogía dedicada a la vida de Jesús, donde se narran vida pública, pasión y muerte.

programme.title: Fuerza 10 de Navarone
programme.desc: Durante los días más oscuros de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, los ejércitos de Hitler están asaltando a través de Europa, aniquilando toda oposición a su paso.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: The Lookout
programme.desc: Chris "Slapshot" Pratt (Joseph Gordon-Levitt), cuyo brillante futuro fue cortado por un accidente, es un conserje nocturno en un banco. Solitario y frustrado, Chris cae en las garras de un estafador y lo ayuda a robar el banco donde trabaja.

programme.title: Abandono
programme.desc: Del escritor ganador del Oscar por la película “Tráfico” llega esta fascinante novela de suspenso con ingeniosos giros argumentales. Katie Holmes interpreta a la alumna guiada por el éxito atormentada por la misteriosa desaparición de un exnovio.

programme.title: La gran estafa
programme.desc: Es un relato fascinante y sorprendente de la increíble historia real sobre el fraude que sacudió a la comunidad literaria del hombre que vendió una biografía fraudulenta de Howard Hughes al gigante editorial McGraw Hill.

programme.title: Texas rangers: los justicieros
programme.desc: Después de la Guerra Civil, Texas queda a merced de los bandidos asesinos. Un grupo de héroes inusuales lucha contra los bandidos. Sobrepasados en cantidad y armas, juntan coraje para proteger a los inocentes y hacer lo correcto.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: El informante
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, blanqueador de capitales, sufre un accidente automovilístico que lo deja sin memoria, con millones en efectivo, y un grupo de policías corruptos persiguiéndole. Liam Hemsworth protagoniza este oscuro thriller de acción.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) protagoniza Rogue Warfare, una película llena de acción en la que se reúne un equipo internacional de soldados expertos de las fuerzas especiales, para una misión secreta en Afganistán.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Jóvenes defensores
programme.desc: La III Guerra Mundial se ha llevado a cabo, dejando a un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria como refugiados que deben organizarse gradualmente en un cuerpo guerrillero.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos. Desde sus humildes inicios en un pequeño escenario hasta llegar a las brillantes luces de Hollywood.

programme.title: La poción
programme.desc: Una pareja tiene problemas en su relación, pues no tienen dinero, ni su familia, ni los bancos les pueden ayudar. La mala situación económica provoca que la pareja busque la solución a sus problemas en el reclamo de un seguro de vida.

programme.title: El Alien y yo
programme.desc: Una banda de punk contrata a Pepe, un tecladista con síndrome de Down, pero es tan talentoso que termina por opacarlos en el escenario.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Bienvenido a Belko Industries, un tranquilo lugar de trabajo que está a punto de convertirse en un sangriento campo de batalla, cuando 80 empleados son encerrados en su edificio de oficinas y obligados a jugar un juego despiadado de matar o morir.

programme.title: Sumergidos
programme.desc: En lo que debería ser una misión de rescate rutinaria, el submarino USS Tiger Shark encuentra a tres sobrevivientes del ataque de un submarino. Pronto, los visitantes parecen desencadenar una serie de sucesos escalofriantes y de otro mundo.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: The Prophecy
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar Christopher Walken protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural donde las fuerzas del cielo y el infierno luchan por la humanidad. Solo un excura detective y una niña podrán frenar al ángel negro Gabriel (Walken) y salvar el mundo.

programme.title: La profecía 2: soldados de Dios
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar, Christopher Walken, regresa como el amenazante ángel Gabriel. Cuando los poderes del bien y del mal descienden a la Tierra en una lucha por la humanidad, la única esperanza es el hijo nonato de una inocente (Jennifer Beals).

programme.title: La profecía 3: el ascenso
programme.desc: Christopher Walken protagoniza en The Ascent, la tercera película de la saga, La profecía. Mientras los ángeles desatan la guerra en la Tierra, un semi-humano descubre por su ángel guardián Gabriel, que deberá salvar el mundo.

programme.title: La Profecía 4: La Revelación
programme.desc: Cuando un antiguo manuscrito religioso cae en las manos de una joven ignorante, pronto ella se verá metida en el centro de una batalla épica entre ángeles caídos despiadados, que moverán el cielo y tierra para obtener el libro de las profecías.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Clerks
programme.desc: La famosa película independiente que lanzó la carrera de Kevin Smith y se ganó al público por su energía franca, comedia extravagante y música a la moda, Clerks muestra un humor ingenioso y el debut de los íconos populares Jay y Bob el silencioso.

programme.title: La chica de rojo

programme.title: El mundo está loco, loco

programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.
